PROP-01b-partial1-inv-008.text: isValidSignature must enforce receiver == address(this) to prevent diverting bought tokens.
PROP-01b-partial1-inv-008.assertion: forall isValidSignature(hash,sig): order.receiver == address(this); else revert InvalidReceiver

locations.note: receiver check at lines 138-140: order.receiver != address(this) => revert InvalidReceiver
